site.name: Colorado Gambler
site.description: Colorado's definitive casino gaming guide — covering Black Hawk, Central City, and Cripple Creek since 1991. Casino directory, sportsbook promos, historic podcasts, and back issues.

pages.title: Colorado Gambler — Black Hawk · Central City · Cripple Creek | Est. 1991
pages.description: Colorado's casino authority since 1991. Complete casino guide for Black Hawk, Central City, and Cripple Creek — plus 13 Colorado sportsbook promos, historic podcasts, and 35 years of back issues.

pages.title: Colorado Casino Guide 2026 — Black Hawk, Central City & Cripple Creek
pages.description: Complete directory of all 22 licensed casinos in Colorado's three gaming towns. Casino profiles, games, hours, amenities, and current promotions.

pages.title: Best Colorado Sportsbook Promos 2026 — All 13 Licensed CO Sportsbooks
pages.description: Compare welcome bonuses, promo codes, and deposit matches from all 13 licensed Colorado sportsbooks. DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, Caesars, and more. Updated weekly.

pages.title: Colorado Gaming History Podcasts — Colorado Gambler
pages.description: Historic Colorado gaming stories in audio. From the 1991 vote that legalized casino gaming to the first year of legal sports betting — 35 years of history.

pages.title: Claim Your Casino Listing — Colorado Gambler Verified Directory
pages.description: Casino operators: claim your verified listing in Colorado's most trusted gaming guide. Enhanced profiles, promotional links, and the Colorado Gambler Verified badge.

pages.title: Colorado Gambler Brand Kit — Official Logos, Colors & Guidelines
pages.description: Official Colorado Gambler brand assets including logos, color palette, typography system, and usage guidelines for casino operators and media partners.

pages.title: About Colorado Gambler — Patrick Sweeney, Est. 1991
pages.description: Colorado Gambler was founded by Patrick Sweeney in 1991 — the same year Colorado legalized casino gaming. 35 years of covering Black Hawk, Central City, and Cripple Creek.
